about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Frontend Developer and Scrum Master with a strong technical background in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I lead Agile teams to deliver high-impact digital products, optimize delivery processes, and foster cross-functional collaboration. My approach combines hands-on development with a business mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A curated selection of my recent work. Each project demonstrates my commitment to quality, innovation, and user experience. Discover how I solve real-world challenges with creativity, code, and Agile leadership.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.description: Looking for my CV or other resources? Download the files below to learn more about my experience and skills. More documents will be added soon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Your Name
contact.description: Interested in working together or have a question? Fill out the form below and I’ll get back to you soon.
